answer: Importance: High Good Afternoon- If you are aware of any other participants for the meeting at the Governor's office on Monday, November 27, please forward this email to them ASAP! Friedl Government and Regulatory Affairs Phone: 925.600.2323 Fax: 925.600.8925 Email: lfriedl@calpine.com -----Original Message----- From: Laura Friedl Sent: Wednesday, November 22, 2000 12:23 PM To: 'nick.wallace@dynegy.com'; 'lynn.lednecky@dynegy.com'; 'wfhall2@duke-energy.com'; 'njdeschane@duke-energy.com'; 'john_h_stout@reliantenergy.com'; 'curtis_l_kebler@reliantenergy.com' Cc: Joe Ronan; James Macias; Eileen Koch Subject: Meeting on Monday, November 27 Importance: High Good Afternoon, There will be a luncheon meeting held at the law offices of Paul, Hastings, Janofsky and Walker on Monday, November 27 at 11:00 a.m. [msg: <20293939.1075843044959.JavaMail.evans@thyme>] [msg: <33001577.1075843044983.JavaMail.evans@thyme>] susan.mara@enron.com jeff.dasovich@enron.com Here you go ----- Forwarded by Susan J Mara/NA/Enron on 11/22/2000 02:25 PM ----- Jack Pigott 11/22/2000 02:01 PM To: "'Susan.J.Mara@enron.com'" cc: Sue - Calpine is hosting a pre-meeting at a law firm near the Governor's office in L.A. Enron is invited, so please forward this to the appropriate people. [msg: <20293939.1075843044959.JavaMail.evans@thyme>]
